query:
INSERT INTO heroMechanisms (
  userId, serviceId, mechanismSetId, tabType,
  mechanismName, mechanismDescription,
  targetMarket, pressingProblem, whyProblem, whatTried, whyExistingNotWork,
  desiredOutcome, credibility, socialProof,
  createdAt, updatedAt
) VALUES (
  7110001, 1470001, 'rev-hmset-001', 'hero_mechanisms',
  'Heart-Mind Activation Method',
  'The Heart-Mind Activation Method is a proprietary 3-phase framework that rewires how life coaches attract clients by aligning their authentic message with proven direct-response marketing principles. Unlike generic business coaching, this method activates both the emotional resonance (heart) and strategic clarity (mind) needed to consistently attract premium coaching clients.',
  'life coaches who want consistent 5-figure months',
  'getting consistent leads and struggling with feast-or-famine income cycles',
  'Most coaches lack a systematic approach to lead generation and rely on referrals alone',
  'Generic marketing courses, social media posting, and networking events',
  'These solutions do not create a repeatable system tailored to the coaching niche',
  'consistent 5-figure months with a full calendar of ideal clients',
  'Certified coach with 5+ years helping coaches build profitable practices',
  'Over 200 coaches have used this method to achieve consistent 5-figure months',
  NOW(), NOW()
);

INSERT INTO hvcoTitles (
  userId, serviceId, hvcoSetId, tabType,
  title, targetMarket, hvcoTopic,
  createdAt, updatedAt
) VALUES (
  7110001, 1470001, 'rev-hvco-001', 'long',
  'The 5-Figure Coach Blueprint: How Life Coaches Are Getting Consistent Leads and Building 5-Figure Months Using the Heart-Mind Activation Method',
  'life coaches',
  'The 5-Figure Coach Blueprint',
  NOW(), NOW()
);
